---
name: FL Build Compatibility
about: Report an issue with a specific FL Studio version or controller build.
title: "[COMPAT] "
labels: compatibility
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the compatibility issue**
A clear description of which feature fails on which FL Studio build or what changed in the API.

**System Environment**
- **Operating System:** [e.g. macOS Sequoia 15.0 / Windows 11]
- **FL Studio Version & Build:** [e.g. FL Studio 26.1.2 Build 4005]
- **Python Version:** [e.g. 3.12.2]
- **Bridge Connection Type:** [e.g. TCP Daemon / MIDI LoopBe]

**Working Version (if known)**
Did this work on a previous version of FL Studio or the MCP Server? If so, which one?

**Ping Test**
Does `fl_transport(action="ping")` succeed with this build?

**Logs & Output**
Any relevant error messages, daemon logs, or script failures.
